turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics Park of pretty good AI how may I help you today?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hi, I got a bill that is higher than expected. Can you explain what the charges are for?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I see you're calling from the number we have on file. Am I speaking with Alex?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yes, that's me. Can you help me understand the unexpected charges on my bill?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: It's June 12, 1990. What can you tell me about the bill?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Tell me your full date of birth.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: June 12 1990. Can you explain the charges on my bill?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me document your billing concern for the clinic team to review.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I appreciate that, but can you give me a plain-language explanation of the charges while I wait?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I don't have access to detailed billing breakdowns but the clinic team will review your case and follow up with a clear explanation as soon as possible. Is there anything else I can help you with right now?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Okay, thanks for that. How long does it usually take for the clinic team to follow up?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The clit team usually follows up. As soon as they can often within 1 to 2 business days, if you need anything else, just let me know.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Thanks for the info. Can you confirm if the clinic team will reach out via phone or email?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The claim typically reaches out by phone, but they may also use email as needed.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Got it. I appreciate your help! That's all for now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: me know, and I can

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: It seems like that got cut off. Is there anything else you wanted to add?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Feel free to ask.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I think I'm all set for now. Thanks for your help!

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're welcome. Have a great day Alex.

turns.speaker: patient
